testcase.name: Login and buy a printer should login and buy a printer from PLP using credit card
testcase.classname: should login and buy a printer from PLP using credit card

failure.message: Timed out retrying after 50000ms: Expected to find element: `.mini-cart__row .mini-cart-checkout-button`, but never found it.

testcase.failure: AssertionError: Timed out retrying after 50000ms: Expected to find element: `.mini-cart__row .mini-cart-checkout-button`, but never found it. at CartActions.clickCheckoutBtnOnPopup (https://epson-gb.cbnd-seikoepso3-s2-public.model-t.cc.commerce.ondemand.com/__cypress/tests?p=cypress\integration\tests\03_buy_from_plp.spec.js:3697:8) at Context.eval (https://epson-gb.cbnd-seikoepso3-s2-public.model-t.cc.commerce.ondemand.com/__cypress/tests?p=cypress\integration\tests\03_buy_from_plp.spec.js:6084:25)
